description: China OSM national benchmark matrix with 5 vector + 3 raster + 2 mixed tasks

tasks.name: Create Fishnet
tasks.description: National preprocessing: build a large regular grid

tasks.name: Create Random Points
tasks.description: National preprocessing: generate random point samples

tasks.name: Vector Buffer
tasks.description: National vector analysis: buffer point features

tasks.name: Overlay Intersect
tasks.description: National vector analysis: intersect large polygon grids

tasks.name: Spatial Join
tasks.description: National vector analysis: spatial join points to polygons

tasks.name: Create Constant Raster
tasks.description: National raster baseline: create a uniform raster

tasks.name: Raster Resample
tasks.description: National raster analysis: resample to a new cell size

tasks.name: Raster Clip/Mask
tasks.description: National raster analysis: clip the large raster window

tasks.name: Polygon to Raster
tasks.description: National mixed analysis: convert polygons to raster

tasks.name: Raster to Point
tasks.description: National mixed analysis: convert raster cells to points
